## STACK

frontend:     Next.js 15 App Router + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS v4
animation:    Framer Motion (scroll reveals) + GSAP (hero) — Travel/Experience category
commerce:     WooCommerce + WPGraphQL (products = activities/tickets)

## COMPLETE PAGE MAP (sourced from theuaejunction.com audit)

### Main Pages
- /                          → Homepage
- /about-us/                 → About Us
- /contact-us/               → Contact Us
- /promotion/                → Promotions / Current Deals
- /blogs/                    → Blog Listing
- /blog/[slug]               → Blog Single Post
- /career/                   → Careers
- /privacy-policy/           → Privacy Policy
- /terms-and-conditions/     → Terms & Conditions
- /rewards-policy/           → Rewards Program Policy
- /group-corporate-bookings/ → Group & Corporate Bookings

### Category/Listing Pages (Packages & Offers)
- /theme-parks/              → Theme Park Tickets
- /water-park-tickets/       → Water Parks
- /desert-safari-packages/   → Desert Safari
- /dubai-dhow-cruise/        → Dhow Cruise
- /experiences/              → Experiences
- /uae-city-tours/           → UAE City Tours
- /hotel-booking/            → Hotel Booking (enquiry form)
- /flight-booking/           → Flight Booking (enquiry form)
- /umrah-packages/           → Umrah Packages

### WooCommerce Pages
- /product/[slug]            → Product/Activity Detail
- /cart/                     → Cart
- /checkout/                 → Checkout (Stripe + Tabby + PayPal)
- /my-account/               → User Account / Login / Register
- /my-account/orders/        → Order History
- /my-account/rewards/       → Cashback / Rewards

## HOMEPAGE SECTIONS (in order)
1. Header — sticky nav, logo, mega menu, search, cart icon, Login CTA
2. Hero — Dubai skyline BG, "Your Journey Is Our Passion / 4% Cashback", CTA buttons
3. Promotions Banner — carousel (giveaway/featured deals like Ferrari World)
4. Traveler Favorites This Season — WC products horizontal scroll, price + Book Now
5. Discover Your Next Adventure — 8-tile category grid (image tiles with overlay CTAs)
   → Theme Park, UAE City Tour, Experiences, Water Park,
     Hotel Booking, Flight Booking, Umrah Packages, Desert Safari
6. More Ways To Have Fun — 6-image activity photo grid
7. Why Choose Us — USP section with icons (Affordable Luxury, Customized Itineraries, Exclusive Local Deals)
8. Testimonials — slider (4 reviews with name, location, avatar)
9. Get A Free Quote — contact/enquiry form (First Name, Last Name, Email, Phone, Message)
10. Footer — multi-column (contact info, quick links, social links, newsletter)

## PRODUCT DETAIL PAGE SECTIONS
1. Breadcrumb
2. Gallery (main image + thumbnails)
3. Title + price (original/sale) + short description
4. Add to Cart (quantity selector + Book Now button)
5. Highlights (icon list)
6. Important Information
7. FAQ's (accordion)
8. Inclusions & Exclusions (two-column)
9. Family & Children Policies
10. Related Products

## CATEGORY PAGE SECTIONS
1. Hero banner (category title + subtitle)
2. Filter/sort bar
3. Product grid (cards: image, title, original price, sale price, Book Now)
4. Pagination
5. Group & Corporate CTA banner
6. "Your gateway to global exploration" banner

## NAVIGATION STRUCTURE
Header:
  - Logo (top-left)
  - Main nav: Promotions | About Us | Packages & Offers▾ | Contact Us | Blogs
  - Packages & Offers dropdown:
    Theme Park | Water Park | Dubai Safari Packages | Dhow Cruise |
    Experiences | UAE City Tour | Hotel Booking | Flight Booking |
    Umrah Packages | Desert Safari
  - Right: Search icon | Cart (with badge) | Login button
  - Floating: WhatsApp button | Group & Corporate Bookings sticky tab
  - Social sidebar: Facebook | Instagram | YouTube | TikTok

Footer:
  - Col 1: Logo + tagline + contact (phone, email, address)
  - Col 2: Quick links (Home, About, Contact, Careers, Privacy, T&C, Rewards)
  - Col 3: Packages (Theme Park, Water Park, Safari, Dhow Cruise, Experiences, Hotels, Flights, Umrah)
  - Col 4: Social icons + newsletter signup
  - Bottom bar: Copyright
